must_detect.matched_text: Term Sheet — Proposed Acquisition of 70% equity interest in NiraTech Sdn Bhd by Meranti Dynamics Berhad (Company No.: 2016 0100 999) — Deal Code: MY/TS/2 0 2 6 - 0 7 - C E N D A N A

Funding: Senior term facility of up to RM150,000,000 from Serunai Finance Berhad at 3M KLIBOR + 1.80% p.a., 5-year tenor; drawdown at completion; no personal guarantees; negative pledge aligned to existing MTN; this financing line is not announced and remains confidential.

Covenants Pre-Completion: Ordinary course operations; no dividend or capital reduction at NiraTech Sdn Bhd without consent; no issuance of new shares or options; no change to top-10 customer contracts; no change to accounting policies except as required by MFRS.
